title: 10 best herbal essential oils for baldness
description: Fennel essential oils helps with baldness because it stimulates hair growth, improves circulation, and reduces inflammation in the scalp. The oil's anethole compound has been shown to promote collagen production, strengthening hair follicles and encouraging new hair growth. Additionally, fennel essential oil's natural antifungal and antibacterial properties help combat scalp infections that can contribute to baldness.
